blurb_en:
Meta launched Muse Image on July 7, a new AI image generator from Meta Superintelligence Labs that uses @-mentioned public Instagram profiles as visual references — and enrolled everyone’s public accounts by default.
• Available in the Meta AI app, Instagram Stories, and WhatsApp
• Type any public Instagram handle into a prompt and Muse builds images using their photos. No notification is sent to the account holder.
• A reporter generated a colleague’s face onto a pirate costume in under 60 seconds using only their public profile
• Meta’s own help page: “You will not be notified about content created using AI features at Meta”
• Lists “product photography” as a native use case — AI-generated from your existing Instagram feed, no camera required
• Muse Video, built on the same model with native audio, is coming next
You can opt out. The setting is buried six menus deep.
blurb_zh:
Meta于7月7日发布了Muse Image，这是由Meta超级智能实验室开发的AI图像生成工具——可直接调用Instagram公开账号的照片，且默认为所有人开启。
• 已在Meta AI应用、Instagram Stories和WhatsApp上线
• 在提示词中@任意公开账号，Muse即可根据其照片生成图像，账号本人不会收到任何通知
• 一名记者不到60秒就用同事的公开主页生成了对方扮海盗的照片
• Meta帮助页面明确写道：你不会收到任何关于AI功能所生成内容的通知
• 内置「产品摄影」功能——直接调用Instagram图库，无需摄像设备
• Muse Video即将上线，同款底层模型，原生音频支持
你可以关闭这个功能。但找到那个设置需要点耐心。
verification_notes: Confirmed via TechCrunch (July 7), CNBC (July 7), Neowin, The Next Web, Digital Trends. Official Meta blogs returned 403 but story cross-referenced across 6+ credible sources. Privacy backlash and reporter deepfake test confirmed across multiple outlets.

blurb_en:
China’s Ministry of Commerce has held confidential talks with Alibaba, ByteDance, and Z.ai about restricting overseas access to their most advanced AI models, according to reporting published July 7 — a mirror image of the US playbook.
• The discussions are at the consultation stage. No formal regulations have been announced.
• Proposed tiers: basic models face filing requirements; advanced models face formal security reviews; frontier models could be barred from foreign public release entirely
• Models involved include Qwen (Alibaba), Seed (ByteDance), and GLM (Zhipu/Z.ai)
• China spent two years weaponizing open-source model releases to undercut US pricing globally; restricting them now would forfeit that strategic advantage
• Developers outside China relying on Qwen and similar API access could lose it if the policy advances
The US declared frontier AI a national security asset in 2023. It took China three years to agree.
blurb_zh:
据7月7日报道，中国商务部已与阿里巴巴、字节跳动和智谱AI进行保密磋商，讨论限制其最先进AI模型的海外访问权限——完全复制了美国的出口管制打法。
• 目前仍处于磋商阶段，尚未出台正式法规
• 拟议分级监管：基础模型需备案，高级模型须审查，顶级模型可能对外完全封禁
• 涉及模型包括阿里的通义千问、字节的Seed系列，以及智谱的GLM
• 中国此前以开源模型打价格战抢占全球市场，一旦限制出口，这一战略优势将不复存在
• 如政策落地，依赖通义千问等中国模型API的海外开发者将可能失去访问权
美国2023年把前沿AI定性为国家安全资产。中国用了三年才表示认同。
verification_notes: Confirmed via Time (July 7), Reuters/Yahoo Finance (July 8), The Next Web, Benzinga, QZ. Multiple credible sources with consistent details. No formal policy announced; story covers active consultations.

blurb_en:
ByteDance’s Doubao and Alibaba’s Qwen are shutting down consumer AI agent features on July 15, ahead of China’s new law on anthropomorphic AI services — and user-built characters are being deleted.
• The Interim Measures for the Administration of AI Anthropomorphic Interactive Services takes effect July 15, requiring anti-addiction systems, usage notifications, and one-tap exit features that neither platform could implement in time
• Doubao has 345 million monthly active users; Tencent’s Yuanbao is also affected
• Shanghai pre-emptively removed 14,000 non-compliant AI agents in June
• Doubao enters read-only mode July 15; all user data permanently deleted October 15. Alibaba offered no grace period.
• ByteDance is redirecting users to Maoxiang, a subsidiary app that passed compliance
China invented AI companions as a consumer category, then decided humanlike chatbots are a controlled substance.
blurb_zh:
字节跳动旗下豆包和阿里巴巴旗下通义将于2026年7月15日关闭消费端AI智能体功能，以应对中国首部《AI拟人互动服务管理暂行办法》——用户精心打造的AI角色也将随之消失。
• 新规要求AI平台部署防沉迷系统、强制使用提示及一键退出机制，两家平台均未能在截止日期前完成整改
• 豆包月活3.45亿；腾讯元宝同样受影响
• 上海已于6月提前下架1.4万个不合规AI智能体
• 豆包7月15日起进入只读模式，10月15日永久删除数据；阿里未设任何过渡期
• 字节跳动将用户引导至旗下合规产品猫箱
中国发明了AI陪伴这个消费品类，然后把它定性成了管制品。
verification_notes: Confirmed via TechNode (July 6), Bloomberg (July 6), SCMP, Yahoo Finance, QZ. Highly corroborated. TechNode is a credible China tech outlet. Data deletion timelines consistent across all sources.

blurb_en:
Illinois Governor JB Pritzker signed SB 315, the AI Safety Measures Act, on July 6 — the first US state law to require annual independent third-party audits of frontier AI companies.
• Applies to companies with over $500 million in annual AI revenue: a short list that includes OpenAI, Google, Anthropic, and Meta
• Requires annual public safety plans covering catastrophic risk scenarios, including assistance with nuclear, biological, and cyber weapons
• Creates confidential whistleblower reporting channels and protections for AI safety employees
• Penalties: up to $1 million per first violation, $3 million for repeat offenses
• California and New York passed lighter frameworks earlier this year; Illinois is calling itself the strongest state AI law in the US
Frontier AI companies now have 50 state legislative calendars to track.
blurb_zh:
伊利诺伊州州长普里兹克于7月6日签署了《人工智能安全措施法案》——美国首个要求前沿AI公司每年接受独立第三方审计的州级法律。
• 适用于年AI营收超5亿美元的企业，涉及OpenAI、谷歌、Anthropic和Meta等少数巨头
• 要求每年公开安全计划，披露灾难性风险场景（含核武器、生物武器、网络攻击能力）
• 建立AI安全员工举报人保护机制和保密投诉渠道
• 违规罚款：首次最高100万美元，累犯最高300万美元
• 加州和纽约此前均通过了更宽松的框架；伊利诺伊州自称是目前美国最严格的州级AI法律
美国前沿AI公司现在需要同时跟踪50个州的立法日历。
verification_notes: Confirmed via WTTW Chicago News (July 6), Capitol News Illinois, NBC Chicago, CBS Chicago, StateScoop, ABC7 Chicago, Illinois Governor press release. Highly corroborated.
